changes.description: Added Ship Shop as a weekly roster-wide task.
changes.details: Ship Shop can now be tracked in To Do and reminds you which ports sell gems when completed.

changes.description: Added a daily Sea Coin header reminder.
changes.details: When Ship Shop is tracked, a small ship icon in the header reminds you to buy 300 Sea Coins in your Stronghold. Multiple rosters can be completed individually.

changes.description: Added Lost Ark Bible preview links to MeowConnect Logs.
changes.details: When LOA Logs has uploaded a clear to lostark.bible, MeowConnect Logs can now show compact per-gate preview links on the matching shared clear.

changes.description: Added optional MeowConnect friend clear hints.
changes.details: System Settings now includes an opt-in MeowConnect toggle that can use friends' LOA Logs evidence to fill missing local raid gate completions as a MeowConnect source, while completed manual and local LOA Logs clears keep priority.

changes.description: Rested values now catch up correctly after multiple missed resets.
changes.details: Characters that were not cleared while the app was closed for multiple daily resets now receive +10 rested per missed reset cycle, instead of only catching up one cycle.

changes.description: Roster-wide task completions are more reliable.
changes.details: Roster-wide tasks such as Ship Shop, Sea Coins, Chaos Gate, and Field Boss now keep their completion state even if the original stored character is removed from the roster.

changes.description: Dashboard card task icons stay aligned.
changes.details: Weekly and daily icons in dashboard card view now keep stable slots when a weekly task is untracked.

changes.description: MeowConnect Logs handle shared clears more accurately.
changes.details: Shared LOA Logs clears now deduplicate overlapping gate entries, include connected friends found in the encounter player list, and mark borrowed or temporary characters with an info indicator instead of treating them as roster-owned characters.
